title: Adopt Bayesian Update Formula from Doe 2025 Thesis
proposal_summary: Modify the `PromotionIndex` in `Tars.Evolution` to use the exact Bayesian weight-update formula described in Jane Doe's 2025 thesis (Claim claim-t02), as it has proven to enable better zero-shot domain adaptation for EBNF grammar constraints.
provenance: Generated by Seldon during memory-to-action synthesis run 2026-06-29.

suggested_followups.title: Implement Bayesian Update Formula in PromotionIndex.fs
suggested_followups.description: Refactor the grammar weight calculation in Tars.Evolution to match the thesis formula. Write property-based tests to ensure weights never collapse to zero.
